additional_diagnostics.message: 未检测到 HyperBoost 加速，启动可能未享受到系统加速
suggestions: 检查应用是否在 HyperBoost 白名单中
联系 OPPO 系统工程师确认加速策略

additional_diagnostics.message: OPPO 系统服务 ${server_process} 调用耗时 ${dur_ms}ms
suggestions: 联系 OPPO 系统侧确认服务状态
检查是否可以异步调用
检查应用是否有大量状态需要恢复
优化 onResume 中的逻辑

additional_steps.description: 检查 HyperBoost 是否在启动期间生效
additional_steps.name: ColorOS 加速引擎检测
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as boost_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*HyperBoost*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*ColorOS*Boost*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*oplus*boost*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

additional_steps.name: OPPO 系统服务调用
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  server_process,
  client_dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  COUNT(*) as call_count
FROM android_binder_txns
WHERE client_process GLOB '${package}*'
  AND (server_process GLOB '*oppo*'
       OR server_process GLOB '*oplus*'
       OR server_process GLOB '*color*')
  AND client_ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND client_ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
GROUP BY server_process
ORDER BY SUM(client_dur) DESC

additional_steps.description: 检查应用是否从冻结状态恢复
additional_steps.name: 应用冻结状态检测
additional_steps.sql:
SELECT
  s.name as freeze_event,
  s.dur / 1e6 as dur_ms,
  (s.ts - (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})) / 1e6 as relative_ts_ms
FROM slice s
WHERE (s.name GLOB '*freeze*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*Freeze*'
       OR s.name GLOB '*thaw*')
  AND s.ts >= (SELECT ts FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
  AND s.ts <= (SELECT ts + dur FROM android_startups WHERE startup_id = ${item.startup_id})
ORDER BY s.ts ASC

meta.description: 针对 OPPO ColorOS 优化的启动分析，包含 HyperBoost 检测
